heading: Omitted
label: 1300a–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to preparation of membership rolls by the Yavapai Apache Indian Community of the Camp Verde Reservation, the Fort McDowell Mohave-Apache Community, and the Yavapai-Prescott Community, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–461, § 386 Stat. 769Oct. 6, 1972
